sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Citi Raises its Price Target on Johnson Controls (JCI) to $150
feed.summary: Citi raised its price target on Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) to $150 from $139, maintaining a Neutral rating, as part of a Q1 preview for industrial companies. This follows similar actions by Evercore ISI initiating coverage with a $155 price target and Goldman Sachs raising its target to $158 with a Buy rating, citing accelerating organic growth and self-help opportunities. Johnson Controls designs and services building products, and the article notes its potential as an investment while highlighting the greater perceived upside in certain AI stocks.

feed.title: Uber Lawyers Unfazed After Passenger Sexual Assault Verdicts
feed.summary: Uber's legal team has expressed confidence despite recent jury verdicts against the company in passenger sexual assault cases. They argue that the outcomes, which include liability findings in two trials, reinforce the strength of their defense strategy and have tempered expectations for large settlements. Uber plans to maintain its current legal approach, viewing the verdicts as generally positive.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR) reported first-quarter funds from operations of $450.9 million, or $2.04 per share, surpassing analyst expectations of $2.01 per share. The company's revenue of $856 million also beat Street forecasts. Extra Space Storage anticipates full-year funds from operations to be in the range of $8.05 to $8.35 per share.

feed.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On April 29?
feed.summary: The S&P 500 closed down 0.49% on Tuesday, with investors taking profits ahead of major tech earnings and the Federal Reserve's rate decision. Polymarket data suggests a 61% chance of an "Up" open for the S&P 500 on Wednesday, April 29. The market is also looking for signals from the Federal Reserve's policy decision and the performance of "Magnificent Seven" companies.

feed.title: Nominations Open for Platts Global Energy Awards 2026
feed.summary: S&P Global Energy has announced the opening of nominations for the 28th annual Platts Global Energy Awards. Often called the "Oscars of the energy industry," these prestigious awards recognize leadership, innovation, and performance across 19 categories. An impartial panel of international experts will judge the nominations, with winners announced at a ceremony in New York City on December 3, 2026.
